hadith_entries.text:
999. Narrated Abu-Huraira; 'The Prophet said: "A
woman should not observe optional fasting except after her
husband's permission if he is at home (staying with her). And
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
a woman should not allow anyone to enter her husband's
house except with his consent. And whatever she spends of
his wealth as charitable gifts in Allah's Cause without being
ordered by him, he will get half of the reward." (Bukhari).
